title: clusia favus
intro: Clusia favus, also known as the 'Duckweed', is a tropical plant species belonging to the Clusiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clusia favus include reducing fever, treating various skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Clusia favus can be consumed in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, or applied topically as a paste to utilize its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
